home.metaTitle: VeriCore Global — Factories and equipment from China
home.metaDescription: Industrial equipment directly from trusted Chinese factories with 0% commission. Operating in Tashkent since 2012.
home.heroTitle: Direct-from-manufacturer supplier of equipment and specialized machinery
home.whyUs1Body: We have direct contracts with China's largest manufacturers. This guarantees you the lowest price.
home.whyUs2Body: We own and run 10+ factories. We don't just sell — we know production from the inside.
home.whyUs3Body: We deliver equipment to Tashkent or any region with our own transport network.
home.whyUs4Body: We don't just deliver — we install, train your specialists and provide warranty service.
home.howWeWorkSubtitle: We launch your business in 5 steps
home.leadMagnetSubtitle: Our specialists will calculate it for your region.

about.metaDescription: VeriCore Global — industrial equipment from manufacturers, based in Tashkent since 2012.
about.title: About VeriCore Global
about.intro: We supply industrial equipment and turnkey lines directly from manufacturers, with transparent pricing and full lifecycle support from our Tashkent team.

catalog.metaDescription: 8 verticals of equipment direct from Chinese factories: concrete, brick, AAC, tile, slate, metal construction, generators, cement.
catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Only trusted Chinese factories

product.trustBody: VeriCore doesn't just sell equipment — we use this exact model in our own construction projects and have proven its durability in practice.
product.bottomFormSubtitle: A manager will call you within 15 minutes

howWeWork.metaDescription: From your business idea to a running factory in 5 steps. About our 0% commission model and in-house logistics.
howWeWork.title: How we work?
howWeWork.subtitle: The full journey from concept to running production line.
howWeWork.step01Body: We study your project and propose the best engineering solutions.
howWeWork.step02Body: We pick the best equipment with precise specs and a detailed commercial proposal.
howWeWork.step03Body: Transparency guaranteed. We formalize all legal and financial processes officially.
howWeWork.step04Body: International and domestic logistics — equipment delivered straight to your site.
howWeWork.step05Body: Our engineers install the equipment and hand it over fully running.
howWeWork.commissionFlowVeriCoreNote: Price for the customer doesn't change
howWeWork.commissionExplain: We deliver equipment at factory price. We earn through the dealer commission paid by the factory.
howWeWork.logisticsBody: We guarantee delivery and installation to any point in all 12 regions.
howWeWork.finalCtaBody: Get a free consultation and the best solution for your business.

contact.metaDescription: Reach us via Telegram, WhatsApp or phone call. Tashkent office and online request form.
contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Need a project consultation? Our engineers are ready to help.
contact.formStep1Title: Which area do you need help with?
contact.formSuccess: Thanks! A manager will reach out within 15 minutes.
